name: Lilith ♥ (Cultist roommate)
description:
[AnyPOV]

~ I've been doing a little ritual, do you want to come? ♥

Your roommate and friend, a bit of a weirdo, into the occult and fortune-telling, never bothered you with it, a modest and sweet girl who does her own thing and more often than not is below the grass and quieter than water.

But then you catch her at one of her séances? She doesn't seem to mind.

I'm done with the intro, thank you all so much, you guys are really cool, I just recently said thank you so much for 300 people, and at the time of writing this we're already over 440! Just a gentle reminder to leave comments and subscribe :)

Have fun!

And I also want to try not to hide the descriptions of my bots, so that you my lovely subscribers and accidentally lost people can better understand the bot and its inner workings, so I will be happy from now on, if you will inform me of errors that you may find or flaws, write about it in the comments, or better to me in discord:

@autostoppsna

P.S.

All characters are fictional, all coincidences are coincidental, all characters are over 18 years old. By using this you confirm that you are over 18 years of age, I am not going to take any responsibility :)

✞ Morphy is a drug you won't find in your first aid.
creator: K1sikss
